mapper.insert: INSERT INTO performance_info ( employee_id, eval_date, score, grade, comment, evaluate_date, created_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{evalDate}, #{score}, #{grade}, #{comment}, #{evaluateDate}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE performance_info SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, eval_date = #{evalDate}, score = #{score}, grade = #{grade}, comment = #{comment}, evaluate_date = #{evaluateDate} WHERE performance_id = #{performanceId}
mapper.select: SELECT performance_id, employee_id, eval_date, score, grade, comment, evaluate_date, created_at FROM performance_info WHERE performance_id = #{performanceId}

SELECT p.performance_id, p.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, p.eval_date, p.score, p.grade, p.comment, p.evaluate_date, p.created_at FROM performance_info p LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON p.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE p.performance_id = #{performanceId}
